_note: In My Own Words — Matt's own blog. Intentionally empty until Matt publishes a post here (add entries to this array, or wire a writer). The AI-written weekly chronicle is a separate feed under the Chronicle tab (/journal/posts.json).
_schema: Each post: {id, title, date, excerpt, url, word_count?, image_url?, image_credit?}. image_url/image_credit are optional atmospheric cover art (Part II); when present the reader renders a warm-duotone header band + attribution.
